args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, Factory, createApp, createMiddleware
- Reads as: TypeScript file with generics for multi-handler factory patterns (up to 10 handlers)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/*, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts
- Safe summary: Factory helper provides createApp and createMiddleware with typed multi-handler support (up to 10 handlers), extends Env types, works with Hono options.

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: TypeScript file with Context type imports and route matching utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/*, src/context.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/types.ts
- Safe summary: Route helper provides matchedRoutes() to get RouterRoute[], routePath() to get registered path, baseRoutePath() for base path, and basePath() for cached path computation with parameters.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, WSReadyState, WSContextInit, SendOptions, createWSMessageEvent, defineWebSocketHelper
- Reads as: TypeScript file with WebSocket event types, WSContext class for control, upgradeWebSocket helper factory
- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/*, src/context.ts, src/types.ts
- Safe summary: WebSocket helper provides WSEvents interface with onOpen/onMessage/onClose/onError, UpgradeWebSocket type with function overloads, WSContext class for sending/closing messages, and defineWebSocketHelper factory function.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: TypeScript file with cookie utility functions using parse/serialize from utils/cookie
- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/*, src/utils/cookie.ts
- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides getCookie/getSignedCookie for reading, generateCookie/generateSignedCookie for creating, setCookie/setSignedCookie for writing, and deleteCookie to remove cookies with __Secure- and __Host- prefix support.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: TypeScript file importing hc from client, returns Client type
- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/*, src/client/index.ts, src/client/types.ts
- Safe summary: Testing helper provides testClient() factory that creates a typed Client for Hono apps with custom fetch implementation, supporting Env, Bindings, and ExecutionContext.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
- Reads as: TypeScript file with runtime detection logic for node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light
- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/*
- Safe summary: Adapter helper provides env() typed access to runtime environment, Runtime type with 7 runtime options, getRuntimeKey() auto-detection using userAgent, and checkUserAgentEquals() for platform matching.

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext, rawCssString
- Reads as: TypeScript file exporting css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style from css/common.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts
- Safe summary: CSS helper exports experimental css() for styled templates, cx() for class combining, keyframes() for animations, viewTransition() for transitions, Style() component, and createCssContext() for custom ID contexts.

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, minify, rawCssString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug
- Reads as: Utility TypeScript file with CSS processing, hashing, minification, and class name generation
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts
- Safe summary: CSS common utilities provide symbol-based constants (SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING), toHash() hashing, minify() CSS reduction, cssCommon() template processing, cxCommon() class merging, keyframesCommon() animations, viewTransitionCommon() transitions.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: TypeScript file with ProxyFetch function, hopByHopHeaders array, strictConnectionProcessing option
- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/*, src/http-exception.ts
- Safe summary: Proxy helper provides proxy() fetch wrapper with hopByHop header filtering, RequestInit support, strictConnectionProcessing for RFC 9110 compliance, and automatic content-encoding header deletion.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: TypeScript file with RouteData interface, handlerName function, colorEnabled check
- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/*, src/hono.ts, src/utils/color.ts
- Safe summary: Dev helper provides inspectRoutes() returning RouteData[], showRoutes() console printing with optional colorization, and getRouterName() for retrieving router identifier via match().

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: TypeScript file importing escapeToBuffer, raw, stringBufferToString from utils/html
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/*, src/utils/html.ts
- Safe summary: HTML helper exports raw() and html() template tag function that processes TemplateStringsArray with values, handling strings, numbers, booleans, objects, Promises, and isEscaped callbacks via escapeToBuffer and stringBufferToString.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
- Reads as: Re-exports ssg/* exports, plugin exports from ssg/plugins, ssgParams/middleware exports
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: SSG index exports ssgParams middleware for dynamic route params, disableSSG/onlySSG middleware, and defaultPlugin/redirectPlugin from plugins module for static site generation.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGResult, FileSystemModule, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks, combineAfterGenerateHooks
- Reads as: TypeScript file with toSSG() main function, fetchRoutesContent generator, saveContentToFile for file writing, and hook combinations
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/client/utils.ts
- Safe summary: SSG core provides toSSG() generator for static generation, fetchRoutesContent() yielding Promise generators for route fetching, saveContentToFile() for fs.writeFile, and hook combiners for beforeRequest/afterResponse/afterGenerate processing.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Path utility functions with normalizePath, handleSegments, normalize handling for .. and .
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Safe summary: SSG utils provide dirname() path parent, joinPaths() with ../. handling, filterStaticGenerateRoutes() for GET handlers, isDynamicRoute() checking for : or * segments, and ensureWithinOutDir() path traversal prevention.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
- Reads as: Middleware handler for SSG context flag with dynamic route ssgParams injection
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Safe summary: SSG middleware provides ssgParams() for dynamic route params on GET, isSSGContext() checking c.env flag, disableSSG() returning 404 if in SSG, onlySSG() requiring SSG context.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
- Reads as: Exports stream from ./stream, streamSSE/SSEStreamingApi from ./sse, streamText from ./text
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Streaming index exports stream() for general streaming, streamSSE() for Server-Sent Events via SSEStreamingApi class, and streamText() which sets TEXT_PLAIN content-type with chunked encoding.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi, contextStash
- Reads as: Creates TransformStream with StreamingApi, holds contextStash for Bun compatibility, handles abort signal
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/utils/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Safe summary: Streaming helper provides stream() Response wrapper using TransformStream, StreamingApi from utils, contextStash WeakMap for Bun v1.1.27 compatibility with abort signal handling, and onError callback support.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: SSEStreamingApi extends StreamingApi with writeSSE() for event/data/id/retry headers
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/utils/html.ts
- Safe summary: SSE streaming exports streamSSE() setting Transfer-Encoding/chunked and text/event-stream headers, SSEStreamingApi class extending StreamingApi with writeSSE() producing `data:`, `event:`, `id:`, `retry:` lines, SSEMessage interface.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Sets Content-Type to TEXT_PLAIN, X-Content-Type-Options to nosniff, Transfer-Encoding to chunked, calls stream()
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/context.ts
- Safe summary: Text streaming exports streamText() that sets TEXT_PLAIN content-type, nosniff X-Content-Type-Options, and chunked Transfer-Encoding before delegating to stream() for chunked text response.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Exports accepts from ./accepts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/utils/headers.ts
- Safe summary: Accepts helper exports accepts() function from accepts.ts for matching Accept headers with supports array, default option, and optional custom match callback.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts, Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions, defaultMatch
- Reads as: Parses accept header, sorts by q value, finds first supported type, returns default if none found
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/utils/accept.ts
- Safe summary: Accepts module exports accepts() that reads header from Context, parses via parseAccept, uses defaultMatch() to sort by q and find first supported type from supports array, or returns default.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: Re-exports types from ./types
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Safe summary: ConnInfo helper exports AddressType ('IPv6' | 'IPv4' | undefined), NetAddrInfo with transport/port/addressType, and ConnInfo interface with remote property.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: Defines ConnInfo with remote NetAddrInfo, GetConnInfo function type taking Context
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Safe summary: ConnInfo types define AddressType union, NetAddrInfo with optional transport/port/address properties, ConnInfo interface with remote: NetAddrInfo, and GetConnInfo type for Context -> ConnInfo function.
